funcbody:
func (d *dbBase) buildSetSQL(buf buffers.Buffer, cols []string, values []interface{}) {

	var owner string

	quote := d.ins.TableQuote()

	if d.ins.SupportUpdateJoin() {
		owner = "T0."
	}

	_, _ = buf.WriteString("SET ")

	for i, v := range cols {
		if i > 0 {
			_, _ = buf.WriteString(", ")
		}
		_, _ = buf.WriteString(owner)
		_, _ = buf.WriteString(quote)
		_, _ = buf.WriteString(v)
		_, _ = buf.WriteString(quote)
		_, _ = buf.WriteString(" = ")
		if c, ok := values[i].(colValue); ok {
			_, _ = buf.WriteString(owner)
			_, _ = buf.WriteString(quote)
			_, _ = buf.WriteString(v)
			_, _ = buf.WriteString(quote)
			switch c.opt {
			case ColAdd:
				_, _ = buf.WriteString(" + ?")
			case ColMinus:
				_, _ = buf.WriteString(" - ?")
			case ColMultiply:
				_, _ = buf.WriteString(" * ?")
			case ColExcept:
				_, _ = buf.WriteString(" / ?")
			case ColBitAnd:
				_, _ = buf.WriteString(" & ?")
			case ColBitRShift:
				_, _ = buf.WriteString(" >> ?")
			case ColBitLShift:
				_, _ = buf.WriteString(" << ?")
			case ColBitXOR:
				_, _ = buf.WriteString(" ^ ?")
			case ColBitOr:
				_, _ = buf.WriteString(" | ?")
			}
			values[i] = c.value
		} else {
			_, _ = buf.WriteString("?")
		}
	}
}
